mapper.insert: insert into leave_application (student_id, student_name, venue_id, duty_id, leave_type, start_time, end_time, reason, proof_image, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{studentId}, #{studentName}, #{venueId}, #{dutyId}, #{leaveType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason}, #{proofImage}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select leave_id, student_id, student_name, venue_id, duty_id, leave_type, start_time, end_time, reason, proof_image, status, approver_id, approve_time, approve_remark, cancel_time, cancel_reason, created_at, updated_at from leave_application where leave_id = #{leaveId}

select 'leave' as application_type, la.leave_id as id, la.duty_id, la.student_id, la.student_name, null as related_student_id, null as related_student_name, la.venue_id, v.venue_name, la.start_time, la.end_time, la.reason, la.proof_image, case la.status when '0' then 'pending' when '1' then 'approved' when '2' then 'rejected' when '3' then 'cancelled' else la.status end as status, la.status as status_code, la.approve_time, la.approve_remark, la.cancel_time, la.cancel_reason, la.created_at from leave_application la left join venue v on la.venue_id = v.venue_id where la.leave_id = #{leaveId} and la.student_id = #{studentId}
